message:
feat(cli): expand robot-mode commands with additional outputs

Enhance the bv CLI with additional robot-mode capabilities:
- Add more structured JSON output options
- Improve command parsing and error handling
- Add additional graph metrics to robot outputs

These improvements make bv more suitable for automation and
integration with coding agent workflows.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
